display_text: Staff of Wizardry, Cost: 1000: Permanent component item providing +10 Intelligence. A foundational piece for building larger intelligence-based items like Scythe of Vyse or Aghanim's Scepter. Provides raw mana pool increase and minor mana regen boost. Stats: Intelligence: +10.
